epic_title: Lab feels like a staffed research lab — agent ownership is visible end-to-end
big_problem: The Lab's six analysts own panels in the registry, but the in-product navigation still groups panels only by abstract category — the staff identity that earns Reddit screenshots is invisible in the sidebar.
